title: Rot
description: Adds Rot item, Inspired by Vintage Story.
body:
Meant to be used alongside mods like [Spoiled](https://modrinth.com/mod/spoiled). Tip: **Don't eat Rot.**

This was made using MCreator for a modpack that is in development. It didn't make sense to me that all food turned to rotten flesh when it spoiled. If you have [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) you can combine Rot and a Tomato to get Rotten Tomatoes. Rotten flesh can still be made by combining any meat with Rot. Most meat should work but special support was added for meat from these mods: [North American Fishes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/north-american-fishes), [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs), [Alex's Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-delight), [Critters N' Crawlers](https://modrinth.com/mod/critters-n-crawlers)

Texture created by [Lorenzo N.](https://www.fiverr.com/l_n_dr)
